games.title: Pips
games.description: Push your luck and win it all with this tavern-themed dice game, inspired by Kingdom Come Deliverance. Roll your dice and grab that gold!

games.title: Kaboo
games.description: Kaboo will test your memory, and your patience! Can you get the lowest score of all your friends? Snap your way to victory with this fast-paced thrilling card game!

games.title: Lumi
games.description: Join Lumi and his friends in this action-packed PvP arena game. Grab power-ups, freeze your opponents, and cast your magic spells until you're the last one standing!
